name: OneSpan Inc.
summary: OneSpan Inc. provides digital security and agreement solutions to global enterprises, including over 60% of the world's 100 largest banks. Its Cybersecurity segment offers multi-factor authentication, FIDO authentication, mobile app protection, and Digipass hardware tokens. Its Digital Agreements segment provides cloud-based e-signature (OneSpan Sign), notarization (OneSpan Notary), and identity verification solutions. The company processes over 100 million digital agreements and billions of authentication transactions annually across more than 120 countries.
